title: Design and development of a novel fused filament fabrication (FFF) 3D printed diffusion cell with UV imaging capabilities to characterise permeation in pharmaceutical formulations.

anchor_evidence.snippet: PAGE 5, Line 114

Figure 11. (a) Average IBU amount in µg/mL permeated vs time. Coloured points correlate with images from Figure 11b (b) UV images of the 3D printed diffusion cell’s IBU permeation at 255 nm. Images colour coded with reference to Figure 11a.
A 5 % w/w ibuprofen gel formulation was used as the model topical formulation. A 100 g tube of the gel was purchased from Vivomed, Downpatrick, UK.

notes: Study demonstrates the 3D printed diffusion cell designed for real-time UV imaging of ibuprofen permeation.
